channel.name: PAS IN

com.mirth.connect.plugins.xsltstep.XsltS.name: PASAPI XSLT Step
com.mirth.connect.plugins.xsltstep.XsltS.template:
<?xml version="1.0"?>
<xsl:stylesheet version="1.0" xmlns:xsl="http://www.w3.org/1999/XSL/Transform">
<xsl:variable name="vLower" select="'abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz'"/> <xsl:variable name="vUpper" select="'ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ'"/>
<xsl:template match="/"> <xsl:element name="Patient"> <NHSNumber><xsl:value-of select="//PID.3[1][PID.3.4/text()='NHS']/PID.3.1"/></NHSNumber> <HospitalNumber><xsl:value-of select="//PID.3[2][PID.3.4/text()='CRN']/PID.3.1"/></HospitalNumber> <IdentifierTypeCode>LOCAL-1-0</IdentifierTypeCode> <Title><xsl:value-of select="translate(concat(translate(substring(//PID.5.5,1,1), $vLower, $vUpper),translate(substring(//PID.5.5,2), $vUpper, $vLower)),' ','')"/></Title> <FirstName><xsl:value-of select="//PID.5.2"/><xsl:if test="//PID.5.3/text()"><xsl:value-of select="concat(' ',//PID.5.3)"/></xsl:if></FirstName> <Surname><xsl:value-of select="//PID.5.1"/></Surname> <DateOfBirth><xsl:if test="//PID.7.1/text()"><xsl:value-of select="concat(substring(//PID.7.1,1,4),'-',substring(//PID.7.1,6,2),'-',substring(//PID.7.1,9,2))"/></xsl:if></DateOfBirth> <Gender><xsl:choose><xsl:when test="//PID.8.1/text()='F'">F</xsl:when><xsl:when test="//PID.8.1/text()='M'">M</xsl:when><xsl:otherwise>U</xsl:otherwise></xsl:choose></Gender> <AddressList> <Address> <Line1><xsl:value-of select="//PID.11.1"/></Line1> <Line2><xsl:value-of select="//PID.11.2"/></Line2> <City><xsl:value-of select="//PID.11.3"/></City> <County> <xsl:choose> <xsl:when test="not(//PID.11.5/text())"><xsl:value-of select="//PID.11.5"/></xsl:when> <xsl:otherwise><xsl:value-of select="//PID.11.4"/></xsl:otherwise> </xsl:choose> </County> <Postcode> <xsl:choose> <xsl:when test="not(//PID.11.5/text())"><xsl:value-of select="//PID.11.4"/></xsl:when> <xsl:otherwise><xsl:value-of select="//PID.11.5"/></xsl:otherwise> </xsl:choose> </Postcode> <Country>GB</Country> <Type> <xsl:choose> <xsl:when test="//PID.11.7/text() = 'H'">HOME</xsl:when> <xsl:otherwise>CORR</xsl:otherwise> </xsl:choose> </Type> </Address> </AddressList> <TelephoneNumber><xsl:value-of select="//PID.13.1"/></TelephoneNumber> <MobilePhoneNumber><xsl:if test="number(translate(normalize-space(//PID.13.1/text()), ' ', ''))=translate(normalize-space(//PID.13.1/text()), ' ', '')"><xsl:value-of select="//PID.13[PID.13.2/text()='MOB']/PID.13.1"/></xsl:if></MobilePhoneNumber> <Email><xsl:if test="//PID.13[PID.13.2/text()='Internet']/PID.13.3/text()"><xsl:value-of select="//PID.13[PID.13.2/text()='Internet']/PID.13.3/text()" /></xsl:if></Email> <EthnicGroup><xsl:choose><xsl:when test="//PID.22.1/text()='NKN'">Z</xsl:when><xsl:otherwise><xsl:value-of select="//PID.22.1"/></xsl:otherwise></xsl:choose></EthnicGroup> <IsDeceased><xsl:choose><xsl:when test="//PID.30.1/text()='Y'">1</xsl:when><xsl:otherwise>0</xsl:otherwise></xsl:choose></IsDeceased> <DateOfDeath><xsl:choose><xsl:when test="//PID.30.1/text()='Y'"><xsl:if test="//PID.29.1/text()"><xsl:value-of select="concat(substring(//PID.29.1,1,4),'-',substring(//PID.29.1,5,2),'-',substring(//PID.29.1,7,2))"/></xsl:if></xsl:when></xsl:choose></DateOfDeath> <PracticeCode><xsl:value-of select="//PD1.9.2"/></PracticeCode> <GpCode><xsl:value-of select="substring(//PD1.4.1,1,8)"/></GpCode> <LanguageCode><xsl:value-of select="//PID.15.4/text()" /></LanguageCode> <InterpreterRequired><xsl:value-of select="//PID.15.5/text()" /></InterpreterRequired> <Risks> <xsl:for-each select="//PID.35"> <xsl:value-of select="PID.35.1/text()" /> </xsl:for-each> </Risks> </xsl:element> </xsl:template> </xsl:stylesheet>

com.mirth.connect.plugins.javascriptstep.name: HospitalNumber
VisitDate
VisitTime
ClinicCode
DoctorCode
VisitStatusXML
PartialRecord
NHSNumber
GenerateSecondaryHospitalNumber
Check for warnings
PatientId

com.mirth.connect.plugins.xsltstep.XsltS.name: PASAPI XSLT Step
com.mirth.connect.plugins.xsltstep.XsltS.template:
LOCAL-1-0 <xsl:value-of select="translate(concat(translate(substring(//PID.5.5,1,1), $vLower, $vUpper),translate(substring(//PID.5.5,2), $vUpper, $vLower)),' ','')"/> FMU
GB HOME CORR
ZXZX 10 G9999981 --- <xsl:value-of select="//NK1.2.5"/> Next of Kin
GBGB HOME

com.mirth.connect.plugins.javascriptstep.name: HospitalNumber
VisitID
VisitDate
VisitTime
VisitStatusXML
ProcedureXML
PartialRecord
SessionCode
Check for warnings
PatientId

com.mirth.connect.plugins.rulebuilder.Ru.name: Accept message if "msg['MSH']['MSH.9']['MSH.9.2'].toString()" does not equal "M05"

com.mirth.connect.plugins.javascriptrule.name: Appointment Filter
Appointment Filter

com.mirth.connect.plugins.rulebuilder.Ru.name: Accept message if "msg["OBX"]["OBX.3"]["OBX.3.1"].toString()" does not contain "ReportFile"

com.mirth.connect.plugins.javascriptrule.name: BookingType contains cataract

channel.preprocessingScript: // Modify the message variable below to pre process data return message;
